evidence: "If you're a fan of the band and looking for an in depth history of their career..."
"If you're a fan of horror or true crime you'll enjoy this movie."
"It's a great document of a point in time that changed not only Brets life but changed the WWF too."
"They do a good job of keeping everything in chronological order..."
"A nice addition to the other classic pay per views released by WWE."
"They do a good job of going through the history and giving you some the highlight matches..."
"The sound of these releases is nothing short of amazing..."
"The quality of the discs themselves were fine but I felt the packaging and the effort into the overall product left a little to be desired."
"Definitely recommended to any Hendrix fan new or old."
"If you're a fan of the Friday the 13th films or even just the genre you'll enjoy this."
"It's very in depth and there's not much they don't touch on."
"The way it's put together is what makes it worth it."
"I'm sure everyone will have some band that they wish could've been discussed more..."
"Definitely worth the price on here especially with the bonus footage and interviews included."

summary: The user has a strong preference for documentaries, particularly those related to music and true crime. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, favoring slower-paced narratives that provide in-depth insights into their subjects.
